# Demo Article About Local Vaults

This synthetic source describes a local-first vault workflow for generated
notes, manifests, and recoverable support data. It is designed for validation
tests and does not contain real provider output or personal notes.

## Key Points

- Generated notes remain readable as markdown.
- Support files such as indexes and cache records are derived from durable notes.
- Source traceability links later generated notes back to this fixture.

Related fixture notes include [[demo-researcher]] and [[local-first-vaults]].
